package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for audit_logging_executed_in_handler_before_service_success: Audit writes that happen before the service has confirmed success.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule004NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule004NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule004NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario004Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule004NegativeService, input Rule004NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
